<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Dulaglutide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Trulicity is indicated for the treatment of patients 10 years and above&nbsp;with insufficiently controlled type&nbsp;2 diabetes mellitus as an adjunct to diet and exercise  as monotherapy when...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（97.0%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（97.0%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（97.0%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（96.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（96.6%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（95.6%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（95.5%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（95.4%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（95.3%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（95.0%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（69.6%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（65.6%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（64.9%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（64.3%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（63.7%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（63.5%）</li>
<li>pancreas, dorsal, agenesis of（61.1%）</li>
<li>familial chronic myelocytic leukemia-like syndrome（60.5%）</li>
<li>lymphopenic hypergammaglobulinemia, antibody deficiency, autoimmune hemolytic anemia, and glomerulonephritis（59.9%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（59.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
